Position.description: Position of the Luminaire in global Cartesian 3D space. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

Type.description: The type of the Luminaire (e.g. recessed cove, task lighting, etc)

Orientation.description: The direction that the Luminaire is oriented towards. Basis: An ordered set of mutually orthogonal unit vectors defining three-dimensional orientation in space

LuminaireType.description: The Luminaire Type applied to the Luminaire. LuminaireType: A LuminaireType containing manufacturer, dimensional, and other property data applied to a Luminaire.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
